nasb.text: He also said, “Blessed be the Lord, The God of Shem; And let Canaan be his servant.

esv.text: He also said, “Blessed be the Lord, the God of Shem; and let Canaan be his servant.

cnv.text: 又說： “耶和華，閃的　神， 是應當稱頌的；願迦南作他的奴僕。

ccb.text: 又说： “闪的上帝耶和华当受称颂！ 迦南要做闪的仆人。

csbs.text: 又说： “耶和华——闪的神是当受颂赞的！ 愿迦南作闪的奴仆。
